name: Welcome to Oaxaca
description: We traveled to Oaxaca for New Years in 2025. It was one of our favorite trips. A wonderfully-sized city with a wide range of activity, strong culture, and great food on every corner.

name: Where to Eat
description: The quality of food in Oaxaca is no secret, and it's nearly impossible to make a bad choice. It's worth trying every mole, grabbing a taco each time you pass a stand, and sipping cafe de olla and mezcal.

name: Where to Stay
description: Oaxaca is known for its delicious Where to Eat. We've loved eating our way through the city and trying new dishes.

name: Not Recommended
description: Oaxaca is known for its delicious Where to Eat. We've loved eating our way through the city and trying new dishes.
